name: Baseline-002: darkcore classifier (sentence-transformer + balanced LR)
description: The shipped dark-core classifier from papers/consensus-hallucination/darkcore_classifier_2026_05_27.py (commit a3dc813), wrapped in the gauntlet interface. Trained on ICT receipts + curated truth controls; curated folklore items are held out as the cross-corpus test set. Embedding: sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2. Head: balanced one-vs-rest logistic regression.
